license_note: Artwork (c) Mistwalker / artist Kimihiko Fujisaka. Personal non-commercial fan project use only; do not distribute.
art_format: Adventurer job art is 1414x2000 PNG (wiki original via format=original); enemy art is smaller in-game sprite renders.

early_story_context.chapter_1: Borderlands (tutorial). Start with Healer + choice of Bahl or Grace; recruit Knight (tavern) and Archer (Bahl start) or Warrior (Grace start). Enemies: Wee Orbling, Orbling (1-5 boss, Lv3).
early_story_context.chapter_2: To the Capital. Enemies: Orbling, Gorf, Dracorin, Sabertooth; boss Spinetrich (2-5, Lv9). Dracorin can drop as a recruitable monster in 2-3/2-4/2-5.

characters.name: Grace
characters.notes: Starter character (player picks Grace or Bahl). Huntress of Thanvarahaer, ~15 years old. Job1 skills: Megabow, Attack Up 10%, Defense Down 10% (Wild Beast), Poison Arrows.

characters.name: Kuscah
characters.notes: Classic early healer; listed in the wiki's Starter character category (can replace the generic Healer starter during events).

characters.name: Daiana
characters.notes: Early-game fire mage (stonefolk). Currently via Pact of Truth / Pact of Fate.

characters.name: Sh'berdan
characters.notes: Lizardfolk spearman tied to the early capital arc (Ch 2-3 introduces lizardfolk/beastfolk). Hybrid ATK/MATK.

characters.name: Gegonago
characters.notes: Beastfolk space mage, early-story era S-class.

characters.name: Ma'curi
characters.notes: Included in place of Zael (see missing). Early-era B-class physical spear attacker; highest base ATK of this set.

characters.name: Amimari
characters.notes: Beastfolk healer; in the wiki's Starter character category (possible Healer replacement at game start during events).

characters.name: Mizell
characters.notes: BONUS / caveat: not an original early-story unit. Z-class character added in game version 4.2.0 (wiki page created 2016-08); included because requested, art kept for reference.

characters.name: Orbling
characters.notes: Iconic early enemy. Boss of stage 1-5 (Lv3); regular Lv3/Lv8 in 2-1, Lv12 boss in 2-2. Tutorial fights use Wee Orbling (same family). Art is in-game sprite, 490x364.

characters.name: Gorf
characters.notes: Frog-like staff enemy throughout Chapter 2 (Lv4-6) and Chapter 4. Art is in-game sprite, 192x380.

characters.name: Dracorin
characters.notes: Lightning bow enemy in Ch 2 (Lv5); ALSO a recruitable monster ally that can drop in stages 2-3, 2-4, 2-5 — a genuine early obtainable unit. Art 459x475.

characters.name: Spinetrich
characters.notes: Boss of stage 2-5 (Chapter 2 finale). Skills: Stab (vertical), Thrust Away (vertical), Discharge (area), Slash/Sever (lateral). Immune (100 resist) to all status ailments. Art 495x446.

missing.name: Zael
missing.reason: Verified NOT an early-story character: wiki availability is 'The Last Story' collaboration event (S-class sword, jobs: Zael the Ex-Sellsword / the Knight / the Outsider King). Skipped; Ma'curi downloaded instead.

missing.name: Mizell (original-era version)
missing.reason: No original early-story Mizell exists on the wiki; the only Mizell is the Z-class unit added in v4.2.0 (2016). Its Job 1 art was downloaded anyway as a bonus (mizell-job1.png).

missing.name: Job 2/3 art for non-starter characters
missing.reason: Skipped to stay within the ~20 download budget. Wiki file naming if needed later: <Name>_job2.png / <Name>_job3.png at https://terrabattle.fandom.com/wiki/Special:FilePath/<Name>_job2.png (append ?format=original for full-res PNG).
